prestazioni: Engine: L539 6.5L V12 (naturally aspirated) – Replace the OEM titanium intake manifold with a custom **Novitec Torado** carbon fiber intake system featuring 12 individual throttle bodies (ITBs) and a **K&N high-flow conical air filter** for optimized airflow at 9,000+ RPM, paired with a **Motec M150 ECU** for real-time lambda and ignition mapping adjustments.

Forced Induction: Install a **Garrett GTX5544R Gen II** turbocharger (single-turbo conversion) with a **Tial MV-R 60mm wastegate** and **Precision Turbo 1000HP intercooler core**, utilizing a **Novitec Torado** billet aluminum intake plenum and **ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs** to handle 18 psi of boost, targeting 1,200+ HP on **Sunoco GT260+ race fuel**.

Drivetrain: Upgrade to a **Graziano VT1500 7-speed ISR transmission** with a **PPG carbon fiber clutch disc** and **Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel**, paired with a **Quaife ATB differential** and **Penske 8760 adjustable shock absorbers** to manage the 1,200 Nm torque output while maintaining launch control stability.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Install a **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS Veneno-specific widebody kit** with **Vorsteiner carbon fiber front splitter**, **Rocket Bunny GT-style rear diffuser**, and **Aeromotions active rear wing** (3-position adjustable) for downforce optimization at 220+ mph.

Exterior: Replace OEM carbon fiber body panels with **Novitec Torado** lightweight forged carbon fiber (visible weave) for the hood, fenders, and roof, finished in **PPG Lamborghini Viola Micalizzato** with **3M Matte Black 2080 wrap accents** on the side skirts and rear bumper.

Wheels & Brakes: Mount **HRE FF16 21x11.5 (front) / 22x13.5 (rear) forged wheels** in **Gloss Black with polished lip**, wrapped in **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (325/25R22)**, paired with **Brembo GT-R 6-piston calipers** and **390mm carbon-ceramic rotors** with **Ferodo DS3000 brake pads** for 1.2G deceleration.
